button.name: subButn
button.label: 选中提交
button.confirmessage: 提交后数据将不能修改，是否确认提交?

autocomplete.columns: EMP_NM; ORG_ID; ORG_NM; BRANCH_ORG_ID; BRANCH_ORG_NM; PSTN_TYPE; PSTN_TYPE_NM; SUB_PSTN_TYPE; SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM
autocomplete.dataset: Select emp.EMP_ID, emp.EMP_NM, emp.ORG_ID, ou.ORG_NM, emp.BRANCH_ORG_ID, emp.BRANCH_ORG_NM, emp.PSTN_TYPE, emp.PSTN_TYPE_NM, emp.SUB_PSTN_TYPE, emp.SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM from IBS.T5_EMP emp inner join ibs.T5_ORG ou on ou.ORG_ID=emp.ORG_ID and ou.ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' where {#condition#} order by emp.EMP_NM

select.value: SELECT EXAM_YEAR ,EXAM_Q ,EMP_ID ,EMP_NM ,ORG_ID ,ORG_NM ,BRANCH_ORG_ID ,BRANCH_ORG_NM ,POSITION_DT ,GDQ_STDT ,GDQ_ENDDT ,DEL_FLAG ,PSTN_TYPE ,PSTN_TYPE_NM ,SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM ,STATUS ,EMP_TYPE from IBS.T5_EMP_GDQ_OR_GZ where EMP_TYPE='过渡期' and coalesce(DEL_FLAG,'0')<>'1' and {#condition#} order by STATUS,EXAM_YEAR desc,EXAM_Q desc,BRANCH_ORG_ID,ORG_ID,EMP_ID

option.source: @{SELECT DISTINCT BRANCH_ORG_ID , CASE WHEN ORG_LEVEL_ID='2' THEN BRANCH_ORG_NM ELSE CONCAT(BRANCH_ORG_NM,'机关') END AS BRANCH_ORG_NM FROM IBS.T5_ORG WHERE ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND ORG_LEVEL_ID IN ('2','3') and (ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#' or HEAD_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#') ORDER BY BRANCH_ORG_ID}
option.label: BRANCH_ORG_NM

report.title: 过渡期名单

select.value: SELECT em.EXAM_YEAR ,em.EXAM_Q ,q.QTD_NM ,em.EMP_ID ,em.EMP_NM ,em.ORG_ID ,em.ORG_NM ,em.BRANCH_ORG_ID ,em.BRANCH_ORG_NM ,em.POSITION_DT ,em.GDQ_STDT ,em.GDQ_ENDDT ,em.DEL_FLAG ,em.PSTN_TYPE ,em.PSTN_TYPE_NM ,em.SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,em.SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM ,em.STATUS ,em.REMARK ,EMP_TYPE from IBS.T5_EMP_GDQ_OR_GZ em left join ibs.T9_YEAR_Q q on em.EXAM_Q=q.QTD where EMP_TYPE='过渡期' and coalesce(DEL_FLAG,'0')<>'1' and STATUS in ('1','3') and {#condition#} order by em.STATUS,em.EXAM_YEAR desc,em.EXAM_Q desc,em.BRANCH_ORG_ID,em.ORG_ID,em.EMP_ID

option.source: @{SELECT DISTINCT BRANCH_ORG_ID , CASE WHEN ORG_LEVEL_ID='2' THEN BRANCH_ORG_NM ELSE CONCAT(BRANCH_ORG_NM,'机关') END AS BRANCH_ORG_NM FROM IBS.T5_ORG WHERE ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND ORG_LEVEL_ID IN ('2','3') and (ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#' or HEAD_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#') ORDER BY BRANCH_ORG_ID}
option.label: BRANCH_ORG_NM

button.name: button1
sub
button.label: 选中通过
button.confirmessage: 提交后数据将不能修改，是否确认提交?

report.footer: *审核不通过需逐条处理，并输入不通过理由。

inputbox.jsvalidate: isNotEmpty(审核不通过的理由为必输项)

select.value: SELECT em.EXAM_YEAR ,em.EXAM_Q ,q.QTD_NM ,em.EMP_ID ,em.EMP_NM ,em.ORG_ID ,em.ORG_NM ,em.BRANCH_ORG_ID ,em.BRANCH_ORG_NM ,em.POSITION_DT ,em.GDQ_STDT ,em.GDQ_ENDDT ,em.DEL_FLAG ,em.PSTN_TYPE ,em.PSTN_TYPE_NM ,em.SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,em.SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM ,em.STATUS ,em.REMARK from IBS.T5_EMP_GDQ_OR_GZ em left join ibs.T9_YEAR_Q q on em.EXAM_Q=q.QTD where EMP_TYPE='过渡期' and coalesce(DEL_FLAG,'0')<>'1' and STATUS in ('1','3') and {#condition#}

button.name: button2
button.label: 提交
button.confirmessage: 提交后数据将不能修改，是否确认提交?

select.value: SELECT em.EXAM_YEAR ,em.EXAM_Q ,q.QTD_NM ,em.EMP_ID ,em.EMP_NM ,em.ORG_ID ,em.ORG_NM ,em.BRANCH_ORG_ID ,em.BRANCH_ORG_NM ,em.POSITION_DT ,em.GDQ_STDT ,em.GDQ_ENDDT ,em.DEL_FLAG ,em.PSTN_TYPE ,em.PSTN_TYPE_NM ,em.SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,em.SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM ,em.STATUS ,em.REMARK ,ou.HEAD_ORG_ID ,EMP_TYPE from IBS.T5_EMP_GDQ_OR_GZ em inner join ibs.T5_ORG ou on ou.ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' and ou.ORG_ID=em.ORG_ID %SQL% left join ibs.T9_YEAR_Q q on em.EXAM_Q=q.QTD where EMP_TYPE='过渡期' and coalesce(DEL_FLAG,'0')<>'1' AND STATUS ='1' and {#condition#} order by em.STATUS,em.EXAM_YEAR desc,em.EXAM_Q desc,em.BRANCH_ORG_ID,em.ORG_ID,em.EMP_ID

option.source: @{SELECT DISTINCT BRANCH_ORG_ID,BRANCH_ORG_NM FROM IBS.T5_ORG WHERE ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND ORG_LEVEL_ID IN ('1','2','3') and (ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#' or BRANCH_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#' or HEAD_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#') ORDER BY BRANCH_ORG_ID}
option.label: BRANCH_ORG_NM

option.source: @{SELECT DISTINCT ORG_ID, ORG_NM FROM IBS.T5_ORG WHERE ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND ORG_LEVEL_ID IN ('1','2') and BRANCH_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID1#' and (HEAD_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#' or BRANCH_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#' or ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#') ORDER BY ORG_ID}
option.label: ORG_NM
